form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (Imperial Count - The Sweedish Filly) making her debut. A good early push suggests she is ready to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Three-year-old filly (Imperial Count - The Sweedish Filly) making her debut. A good early push suggests she is ready to run well.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 5 m finishing third behind Rondo Trouble at this track over 2400m in a 3yo+ on March 26 at $58.20. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third behind Garonne at Ascot Park Raceway over 2200m in a 3yo+ on April 2 at $13.20. Capable of taking this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke shortly after the start losing all chance.

form.formComment: Last start 12th (Fr1) over 2400m at this track well beaten by Rondo Trouble (3:13.20) in 3yo+ on March 26 at $27. Before that, 6th (Fr1) over 2200m at Wingatui, beaten 80 m by Jay Bee Hill (3:07.30) on March 15 at $15.80. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly facing the starter for the second time. At debut 9th (Fr2) over 2400m at this track beaten 30 m by Rondo Trouble (3:13.20) in 3yo+ on March 26 at $17.40. Hard to have.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 10 m finishing fourth behind Rondo Trouble at this track over 2400m in a 3yo+ on March 26 at $19.70. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.4 m finishing second behind Garonne at Ascot Park Raceway over 2200m in a 3yo+ on April 2 at $3.70. Strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (FrU2) over 2200m at Ascot Park Raceway, beaten 10 m by Garonne (2:58.60) in 3yo+ on April 2 at $25.70. Two runs back 8th (FrU1) over 2400m at this track, beaten 25 m by Rondo Trouble (3:13.20) in 3yo+ on March 26 at $37.50. Will struggle to compete against the top handful.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding lining up for the second time. At debut 7th (FrU3) over 2400m at this track beaten 21 m by Rondo Trouble (3:13.20) in 3yo+ on March 26 at $11.30. Well placed, should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (FrU3) over 1800m at Cromwell beaten 70 m by Hunter Hills (2:26.20) on February 22 at $52.80. Two runs back 8th (FrU1) over 1800m at Cromwell beaten 40 m by Glendhu Mischief (2:31.00) in 3yo+ on February 20 at $41.20. Preferred in something easier.

form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run 9th (Fr2) over 2200m at Wingatui beaten 40 m by Joany Baby (3:03.80) in 3yo+ on December 7 at $71.20. Will find this a tough assignment; prefer later.
